name: angular_contact_bearings
reasoning: Critical component with highest failure consequence - bearing failure causes unplanned downtime, scrap parts, and potential damage. Has complex degradation mechanisms (grease degradation, contamination, cage wear, electrical discharge) and multiple fault modes. Observable vibration outputs available for state estimation.

candidate_states.name: grease_degradation
candidate_states.description: Grease condition degradation driven by temperature and contamination

candidate_states.name: bearing_surface_wear
candidate_states.description: Bearing surface degradation from water and dust contamination

candidate_states.name: cage_wear
candidate_states.description: Cage material degradation from wear and friction

candidate_states.name: ball_surface_damage
candidate_states.description: Ball surface degradation from electrical discharge

candidate_events.name: excessive_temperature
candidate_events.description: High temperature generation due to inadequate sealing or excessive preload

candidate_events.name: cage_noise
candidate_events.description: Friction between ball surface and cage guide surface in cold conditions

candidate_events.name: grease_leakage
candidate_events.description: Loss of lubrication due to grease escaping from bearing

candidate_events.name: contamination_ingress
candidate_events.description: Water, dust, or coolant entering bearing causing degradation

name: spindle_motor
reasoning: Primary drive component with thermal dynamics and multiple degradation mechanisms. Motor overheating and velocity control degradation directly impact machining precision. Has observable outputs for speed and current monitoring.

candidate_states.name: motor_temperature
candidate_states.description: Motor temperature accumulation from excessive load and time

candidate_states.name: velocity_error_accumulation
candidate_states.description: Accumulated velocity control error affecting accuracy

candidate_states.name: position_accuracy_degradation
candidate_states.description: Position accuracy degradation from coder signal issues

candidate_events.name: motor_overheat
candidate_events.description: Motor overheat alarm

candidate_events.name: excessive_velocity_error
candidate_events.description: Excessive velocity error alarm

candidate_events.name: overspeed
candidate_events.description: Overspeed alarm

candidate_events.name: short_time_overload
candidate_events.description: Short-time overload alarm

candidate_events.name: motor_lock
candidate_events.description: Motor lock alarm

candidate_events.name: current_overload
candidate_events.description: Current overload alarm

name: spindle_amplifier
reasoning: Control system component with degradation mechanisms affecting cutting capability and velocity control stability. Has multiple observable inputs/outputs and fault conditions that impact overall system performance.

candidate_states.name: velocity_loop_gain_stability
candidate_states.description: Velocity loop gain stability degradation from excessive gain settings

candidate_states.name: torque_response_degradation
candidate_states.description: Torque response characteristic degradation from heavy load application

candidate_states.name: cutting_capability_degradation
candidate_states.description: Cutting capability degradation from improper parameter settings

candidate_events.name: velocity_error_excess_alarm
candidate_events.description: Velocity error exceeds alarm level during acceleration/deceleration

candidate_events.name: excessive_speed_deviation_alarm
candidate_events.description: Speed deviation exceeds detection level in spindle synchronous control

candidate_events.name: excessive_positional_deviation_alarm
candidate_events.description: Positional deviation exceeds detection level in spindle synchronous control

name: position_coder
reasoning: Critical for tool positioning accuracy and orientation control. Has degradation mechanisms affecting signal integrity and multiple fault conditions. Observable position outputs available for monitoring.

candidate_states.name: signal_degradation
candidate_states.description: Position coder signal degradation from disconnection

candidate_states.name: one_rotation_signal_degradation
candidate_states.description: One-rotation signal degradation from detection errors

candidate_states.name: signal_integrity_degradation
candidate_states.description: Overall signal integrity degradation

candidate_events.name: position_coder_disconnected
candidate_events.description: Position coder disconnected

candidate_events.name: one_rotation_signal_detection_error
candidate_events.description: Position coder one-rotation signal detection error

candidate_events.name: one_rotation_signal_not_detected
candidate_events.description: Position coder one-rotation signal not detected

candidate_events.name: position_coder_signal_error
candidate_events.description: Position coder signal error

name: temperature_sensor
reasoning: Essential for preventing motor overheating which has high consequence. Has degradation mechanisms affecting accuracy and fault conditions. Observable temperature output critical for thermal monitoring.

candidate_states.name: sensor_accuracy_degradation
candidate_states.description: Temperature sensor accuracy degradation over time and environmental conditions

candidate_states.name: signal_quality_degradation
candidate_states.description: Sensor signal quality degradation from amplitude and phase deviations

candidate_events.name: motor_overheat
candidate_events.description: Motor overheat alarm

candidate_events.name: temperature_sensor_disconnected
candidate_events.description: Temperature sensor disconnected

name: cylindrical_roller_bearings
reasoning: Handles heavy radial loads with complex degradation mechanisms including fatigue life, grease condition, and cage wear. Multiple fault conditions that can impact spindle performance, though secondary to angular contact bearings.

candidate_states.name: bearing_fatigue_life
candidate_states.description: Bearing fatigue life degradation from radial clearance deviation

candidate_states.name: grease_condition_degradation
candidate_states.description: Grease condition degradation from brass cage wear

candidate_states.name: cage_material_wear
candidate_states.description: Cage material degradation under severe operating conditions

candidate_events.name: flaking_one_side_raceway
candidate_events.description: Flaking on one side of the raceway of radial bearing

candidate_events.name: scoring_raceway_rolling_surface
candidate_events.description: Scoring or smearing between raceway and rolling surface

candidate_events.name: rib_scoring
candidate_events.description: Scoring or smearing between the end face of the rollers and guide rib

candidate_events.name: excessive_preload
candidate_events.description: Excessive bearing preload leading to seizure

candidate_events.name: cage_noise
candidate_events.description: Cage noise in grease lubricated bearings

name: tool_interface
reasoning: Critical for tool positioning accuracy and repeatability. Has degradation mechanisms affecting positioning accuracy and rigidity. Important for preventing out-of-tolerance parts but lower priority than bearings and motor.

candidate_states.name: positioning_accuracy_degradation
candidate_states.description: Cutting tool positioning accuracy degradation from velocity loop gain issues

candidate_states.name: interface_rigidity_degradation
candidate_states.description: Tool interface rigidity degradation from motor power control issues

candidate_states.name: orientation_accuracy_degradation
candidate_states.description: Orientation stop accuracy degradation from improper gear ratio settings
